title: Aether Villages
description: Adds grandiose temples and villages to the Aether dimension!
body:
![](https://i.postimg.cc/FzTfPM2F/aether-villages-banner.png)

This mod adds detailed temples and villages to the Aether dimension. These also contain typical village loot and may include custom villager types in the future.

 

Work in progress.

  
**This mod requires the Aether mod to be present.**

![](https://i.postimg.cc/65Q47Qv8/2024-07-24-22-51-58.png)![](https://i.postimg.cc/8PnJLVRt/2024-07-24-22-52-05.png)![](https://i.postimg.cc/x1JkRFgY/2024-07-24-22-51-28.png)
